ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the incident type */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default severity level associated with the incident type */,
  "is_terrorist" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the incident type is a terrorist attack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_types_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES incident_severity ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the incident */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the incident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the country where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level of the incident */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the incident has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Source or entity that reported the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES incident_severity ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES incident_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "number_killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the incident */,
  "number_injured" INTEGER /* Number of people injured in the incident */,
  "number_us_killed" INTEGER /* Number of US citizens killed in the incident */,
  "number_us_injured" INTEGER /* Number of US citizens injured in the incident */,
  "number_children_killed" INTEGER /* Number of children killed in the incident */,
  "number_children_injured" INTEGER /* Number of children injured in the incident */,
  "number_women_killed" INTEGER /* Number of women killed in the incident */,
  "number_women_injured" INTEGER /* Number of women injured in the incident */,
  "property_damage" TEXT /* Estimated property damage in USD */,
  "economic_impact" TEXT /* Estimated economic impact in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_impact_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the region is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the severity level (for visualization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the severity level is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the database */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the historical record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., news article, government report) */,
  "is_revised" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the record has been revised */,
  "revised_by" TEXT /* User who revised the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_history_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
